title: Norwegian Smoked Stew
description: A hearty stew made with Norwegian smoked meat and a creamy sauce.
instructions: Heat a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrot and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the chopped potato and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the Norwegian smoked meat and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Pour in enough hot water to cover the ingredients and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Stir in the heavy cream and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until heated through.
Season with hot sauce, if desired.
